title: StatefulSets & Data Locality
description: Architect StatefulSets to manage stable network identities and persistent disk attachments for distributed databases. Design data locality strategies for stateful applications like Cassandra, Postgres, or ElasticSearch.
objectives: Architect StatefulSets to manage stable network identities and persistent disk attachments for distributed databases.
Design data locality strategies for stateful applications like Cassandra, Postgres, or ElasticSearch.
